meta.synopsis: Estraven, exiled from Karhide, flees across the Gulf to Orgoreyn, where he struggles to survive as an alien and indigent. He eventually finds work and allies among Orgota officials, and discusses the political situation and the significance of Genly Ai's mission with influential Commensals.
